Ordinary folk of the Overworld, neither long-lived nor short-lived, suited to farm, craft, and trade in equal measure.
origin.townstead_origins.origin.overworl: A native of the surface world, born to a settlement under open sky. The baseline townsfolk from which every other origin departs.
gene.townstead_origins.omnivore.desc: Eats both plants and meat. The unfussy human gut.
gene.townstead_origins.diurnal.desc: Awake by day, asleep by night.
gene.townstead_origins.human_lifespan.de: Ages and matures at the ordinary human pace.
